text: Went to the gym this morning, did 45 minutes on the treadmill. Feeling good about staying consistent.
Had a difficult meeting with my manager Sarah today. She said my Q3 performance was below expectations. Feeling anxious and a bit demotivated.
Paid my credit card bill today — 18,500 rupees. Also transferred 5000 to savings. Money feels tight this month.
Had a really nice dinner with Priya and Rohan at the new Italian place in Bandra. Great food, great conversation.
Feeling very low today. Not sure why — just a general heaviness. Didn't want to get out of bed.
Started learning Python decorators today. It finally clicked after watching three YouTube videos. Excited to apply this.
Doctor's appointment tomorrow at 10am at Lilavati Hospital for a routine checkup. Need to fast from midnight.
Worked on the Spiritbox project all day. Fixed a Weaviate bug that's been bothering me for a week. Shipped it!
Called mum and dad. They're flying in on the 15th for a week. Need to plan some family activities.
Band practice tonight. We ran through the new setlist twice. The bridge in the third song still isn't tight enough.
Booked flights to Goa for the long weekend — 15th to 17th November. Staying at a small beach resort with Aditya.
Really struggling to focus lately. Been doom-scrolling for hours. Need to cut back on screen time.
Salary credited today — 1,20,000 rupees. Set a budget for the month: 30k rent, 15k groceries, 10k savings.
Morning run — 6km in 34 minutes. Personal best! Legs are sore but feeling accomplished.
Had lunch with old college friends Nikhil and Siddharth. Talked for three hours. Really missed them.
Team offsite is next Friday at the Taj in Pune. Need to prep slides for the product review presentation.
Tried a new recipe today — dal makhani from scratch. Took two hours but it turned out amazing.
Meditation streak: 21 days straight. 10 minutes every morning before coffee. Noticeably calmer.
Quarterly review with Vikram went well. He mentioned a possible promotion in January. Excited but trying not to get my hopes up.
Bought new running shoes online — 4500 rupees from Nike. Also renewed my gym membership for 6 months at 9000.
